_comment: Evan AI — Global Invariants (The Laws of the Swarm). Loaded at runtime by swarmInvariants.js. Changes take effect on next enforceInvariants() call.

roiFloor._comment: Never commit capital unless projected ROI > this after all fees.

liquidityRule._comment: Never tie up more than maxPctPerVertical% of total bankroll in one payload vertical.

authenticityLaw._comment: Items flagged as high-risk must pass tripleCheckMinPasses independent Specialist checks before capital is committed.

winningStreak._comment: If N scouts independently report high margins in the same niche within windowMs, auto-reallocate reallocationPct of idle workers to that category.

ledgerSync._comment: Every local agent decision must be synced to the immutable ledger within maxMs.

conflictResolution._comment: When two agents bid on the same item, resolve by agent reputation (historical accuracy in that category).
